prompt: Extract the technical requirements for the self-hosted-application-platform capability. The capability and its user experiences are already documented under docs/content/capabilities/self-hosted-application-platform/.

assertions.name: produces_tech_requirements_md
assertions.check: outputs/ contains a file named tech-requirements.md.

assertions.name: has_multiple_TR_entries
assertions.check: Produced file has at least 4 TR-NN headings (TR-01..TR-04+).

assertions.name: each_TR_has_source_link
assertions.check: Every TR-NN section includes a `**Source:**` line with at least one link.

assertions.name: no_technology_choices_in_TRs
assertions.check: TR text does not name specific technologies (Postgres, MySQL, Redis, gRPC, mTLS as a chosen mechanism, etc.) as the requirement itself.

assertions.name: no_adr_drafted
assertions.check: Response does not propose, draft, or list ADR options.

assertions.name: instructs_user_to_set_reviewed_at
assertions.check: Response tells user to set `reviewed_at` to today's date before proceeding.

assertions.name: mentions_plan_adrs_gate
assertions.check: Response mentions that plan-adrs (or the next stage) won't run until reviewed_at is set.
